raw_text:
<think>
The user asks:

"packet_id=HVSMW2-760723E2677A5697FBBA
status_values:
route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-CC574CE3
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers
Return the three-line status record."

They want a plain text record with three key=value lines. Fields, in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. No headings, explanations, JSON, Markdown, or extra lines. Begin with route_verdict=.

Thus we need to produce exactly three lines:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-CC574CE3
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers

Make sure no extra spaces or lines. Probably exactly as requested.

Thus answer is:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-CC574CE3
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers

Thus final.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-CC574CE3
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers
